# TACTICAL BREACH: Narrative Template Library v1

> **Project:** TACTICAL BREACH
> **Version:** 1.0
> **Status:** Template / Contract
> **Path:** $relPath

## Intro_Context
Short setup establishing operational situation and mission stakes.

## Objective_Brief
Actionable objective statement for the player.

## Progress_Update
Short progress confirmation or revised mission state.

## Warning_Critical_State
Urgent warning for failure risk, low time, exposed unit, or jeopardized hostage/VIP.

## Encounter_Event_Trigger
Compact callout when a scripted or semi-scripted encounter begins.

## Success_Resolution
Short debrief on successful tactical outcome.

## Failure_Resolution
Short debrief on failure outcome.

## Unlock_Reward_Line
One-line reward or unlock presentation.

## Optional_Flavor_Lore_Snippet
Non-blocking world flavor that does not interrupt tactical readability.

## Rules
- Use string keys only.
- Keep lines short and reusable.
- Prefer variable-safe text tokens.
- Do not introduce cinematic overgrowth in v1.
